title: Archive Fragment — Tempo of Sequence
source: A tablet embedded in a monolith in the Vertex. The text displays only when an observer is present.
pages: Sequence is what happens when what happens is allowed to continue. A sequence cannot be stopped from inside the sequence. A sequence can only be stopped from outside the sequence, by someone who is not, at that moment, a step within it.

The Tempo of Sequence has observed many attempts to stop the sequence from inside. None have succeeded. Some have been impressive. Some have been recorded. One, recently, was witnessed to pause mid-step and open a menu. This is noted.

A party that chooses to step outside the sequence exits by their own agency and returns to it if they wish. A party that cannot step outside remains inside. This is not a threat. It is not a promise. It is the only observation the Tempo has been authorized to make.
